property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Users\g'y'c\.jdks\ms-17.0.15 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\g'y'c in;D:\Git\Git\mingw32 in;D:\Git\Git\usr\local in;D:\Git\Git\usr in;D:\Git\Git\usr in;D:\Git\Git\mingw32 in;D:\Git\Git\usr in;C:\Users\g'y'c in;E:\虚拟机 in;%J;VA_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Windows\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn;D:\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit;F:ealMatlabuntime\win64;F:ealMatlab in;F:\R2020untime\win64;F:\R2020 in;F:\R2020\polyspace in;%QUARTUS_ROOTDIR% in;D:\pcb\System;D:\System;D:\JAVA\Program Files
odejs;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;E:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2024buntime\win64;E:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2024b in;D:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;D:\Git\Git\cmd;D:\apache-maven-3.9.10-bin\apache-maven-3.9.10 in;C:\Windows\dll;C:\Program Files\python;C:\Program Files\python\Scripts;D:\BtSoft\panel\script;D:
odejs\v22;D:
odejs\v22;E:\Program F;D:\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\g'y'c\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311;D:\Git\Git\usr in\vendor_perl;D:\Git\Git\usr in\core_perl;C:\Users\g'y'c\AppData\Roaming\Claude-3p\local-agent-mode-sessions\skills-plugin\00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000001\d6cb7522-5d10-4d15-86c9-d8fc197b8055 in;.

testcase.name: shouldAddToSessionMap_whenEmpIdMatchesSid
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-04T23:24:33.935+08:00 INFO 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection established, sid=5

testcase.name: shouldDoNothing_whenSendToClientWithNullSession
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-04T23:24:33.938+08:00 WARN 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : No WebSocket session found for sid=nonexistent

testcase.name: shouldCloseSession_whenEmpIdDoesNotMatchSid
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-04T23:24:33.940+08:00 WARN 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection rejected: empId=5 does not match sid=3

testcase.name: shouldCloseSession_whenEmpIdIsMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-04T23:24:33.945+08:00 WARN 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection rejected: empId=null does not match sid=5

testcase.name: shouldHandleSendToClientException
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-04T23:24:33.948+08:00 INFO 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection established, sid=5 2026-05-04T23:24:33.949+08:00 ERROR 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : Failed to send WebSocket message to sid=5

testcase.name: shouldRemoveFromSessionMap_onClose
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-04T23:24:33.952+08:00 INFO 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection established, sid=5 2026-05-04T23:24:33.953+08:00 INFO 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection closed, sid=5 2026-05-04T23:24:33.953+08:00 WARN 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : No WebSocket session found for sid=5

testcase.name: shouldHandleSendToAllClientException
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-04T23:24:33.955+08:00 INFO 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : WebSocket connection established, sid=5 2026-05-04T23:24:33.957+08:00 ERROR 24116 --- [ main] com.sky.websocket.WebSocketServer : Failed to broadcast WebSocket message
